purpose: Deep research on 阴盘奇门遁甲 (Yin Plate QMDJ) interpretation methods for The Jade Oracle reading engine
school: 长卿 (Chang Qing) lineage, 阴盘奇门
note: Research-only artifact. Focuses on ACTIONABLE interpretation rules codeable into a reading engine.

section_1_ten_stems_interactions.title: 十干克应 (Ten Stems Interactions)
section_1_ten_stems_interactions.description: The CORE interpretation method. When 天盘干 (heaven plate stem) meets 地盘干 (earth plate stem), each of the 81 combinations (9x9) produces a named formation with specific meaning. 天盘 generally represents the matter itself; 地盘 represents external factors affecting the matter.
section_1_ten_stems_interactions.principle: 甲 is hidden (遁), leaving 9 stems: 乙丙丁 (三奇/Three Marvels) + 戊己庚辛壬癸 (六仪/Six Rites). Each pair creates a 格局 (formation) with a classical name and prediction.
section_1_ten_stems_interactions.yin_plate_note: 阴盘 approach de-emphasizes rigid formation names and focuses on 取象 (image-taking) — reading the ENERGY STATE of the stem pairing rather than memorizing 81 fixed meanings. However, the classical names remain useful as shorthand.

jia_group.note: 甲 is hidden, represented by 戊. 甲+X = 戊+X in practice.

甲加甲_戊加戊.name: 伏吟
甲加甲_戊加戊.meaning: Stagnation. Nothing should move. Stay quiet and hidden — movement brings misfortune.
甲加甲_戊加戊.cn: 百事不顺，道路闭塞，以守为好

甲加乙_戊加乙.name: 青龙和会
甲加乙_戊加乙.meaning: Neutral meeting. Outcome depends entirely on the door — auspicious door = good, inauspicious door = bad.

甲加丙_戊加丙.name: 青龙返首
甲加丙_戊加丙.meaning: Green Dragon turns back — great fortune. All plans succeed greatly. But if tomb/punishment present, fortune turns to disaster.
甲加丙_戊加丙.cn: 所谋大利，逢迫墓击刑吉事成凶

甲加丁_戊加丁.name: 青龙耀明
甲加丁_戊加丁.meaning: Green Dragon shines bright. Meet noble people, seek fame and position. If tomb-pressed, invites gossip.
甲加丁_戊加丁.cn: 宜见贵人求功名，迫墓则招是非

甲加己_戊加己.name: 贵人入狱
甲加己_戊加己.meaning: Noble person imprisoned. Both public and private matters fail. Like a puppet controlled by others.

甲加庚_戊加庚.name: 值符飞宫
甲加庚_戊加庚.meaning: Value Symbol flies away. Good things become bad, bad things get worse. Must relocate/change position.
甲加庚_戊加庚.cn: 吉不吉凶更凶，易地安身

甲加辛_戊加辛.name: 青龙折足
甲加辛_戊加辛.meaning: Green Dragon breaks its leg. Auspicious door allows planning, inauspicious door brings disaster and financial loss.
甲加辛_戊加辛.cn: 吉门可谋，凶门招灾失财

甲加壬_戊加壬.name: 青龙入天牢
甲加壬_戊加壬.meaning: Green Dragon enters heaven's prison. Neither yin nor yang matters go well. Isolated and friendless.
甲加壬_戊加壬.cn: 阴阳事皆不吉，落落寡合

甲加癸_戊加癸.name: 青龙华盖
甲加癸_戊加癸.meaning: Green Dragon under canopy. Can hide from disaster with auspicious door. Inauspicious door means problems.
甲加癸_戊加癸.cn: 吉门为吉招福，凶门事多不利

乙加甲_乙加戊.name: 藤罗系甲
乙加甲_乙加戊.meaning: Vine wraps the armor tree — icing on the cake. Gain powerful support, matters proceed smoothly.
乙加甲_乙加戊.cn: 锦上添花，得助力人事圆满

乙加乙.name: 日奇伏吟
乙加乙.meaning: Sun Marvel stagnates. Do NOT seek audiences with nobles or pursue fame/wealth. Stay in your lane.
乙加乙.cn: 忌谒贵求名，只宜安分守己

乙加丙.name: 奇仪顺遂
乙加丙.meaning: Marvels flow smoothly. With auspicious star: promotion. With inauspicious star: marital discord.
乙加丙.cn: 吉星迁官晋职，凶星夫妻反目

乙加丁.name: 奇仪相佐
乙加丁.meaning: Marvels assist each other. BEST for documents, exams, studies. All things favorable.
乙加丁.cn: 最利文书、考试，百事可为

乙加己.name: 日奇入墓
乙加己.meaning: Sun Marvel enters tomb. Buried in darkness. If door is also inauspicious, matter is certainly bad.

乙加庚.name: 日奇被刑
乙加庚.meaning: Sun Marvel punished. Property disputes, spouse harbors secrets.

乙加辛.name: 青龙逃走
乙加辛.meaning: Green Dragon flees. People die, wealth scatters, servants betray, livestock perish.
乙加辛.cn: 人亡财破，奴仆拐带，六畜皆伤

乙加壬.name: 日奇入地
乙加壬.meaning: Sun Marvel sinks underground. Social hierarchy collapses, lawsuits, someone plots harm.
乙加壬.cn: 尊卑悖乱，官讼是非有人谋害

乙加癸.name: 华盖逢星
乙加癸.meaning: Canopy meets star. Good for spiritual retreat, hiding, avoiding disaster.
乙加癸.cn: 遁迹修道，隐匿藏形躲灾避难

丙加甲_丙加戊.name: 飞鸟跌穴
丙加甲_丙加戊.meaning: Bird falls into perfect nest. All things auspicious, great for career and major plans.
丙加甲_丙加戊.cn: 百事吉，事业可为谋大事

丙加乙.name: 日月并行
丙加乙.meaning: Sun and Moon travel together. Both public and private matters go well.

丙加丙.name: 月奇悖师
丙加丙.meaning: Moon Marvel rebels. Documents pressure you, things break and get lost.

丙加丁.name: 月奇朱雀
丙加丁.meaning: Moon Marvel meets Vermillion Bird. Noble people and documents both favorable. With Life Gate = 天遁 (Heaven Escape).
丙加丁.cn: 贵人文书皆吉，得生门为天遁

丙加己.name: 火悖入刑
丙加己.meaning: Fire rebels into punishment. Imprisonment, corporal punishment, documents unfavorable.

丙加庚.name: 荧入太白
丙加庚.meaning: Mars enters Venus — gates and doors broken, thieves steal, wealth drains.

丙加辛.name: 谋事能成
丙加辛.meaning: Plans can succeed (丙辛 combine). Sick people not in danger.

丙加壬.name: 火入天罗
丙加壬.meaning: Fire enters heaven's net. Unfavorable for the guest/outsider. Much conflict.

丙加癸.name: 华盖悖师
丙加癸.meaning: Canopy rebels. Women cause problems, disasters multiply.

丁加甲_丁加戊.name: 青龙转光
丁加甲_丁加戊.meaning: Green Dragon turns its radiance. Officials get promoted, common people gain prestige.

丁加乙.name: 人遁吉格
丁加乙.meaning: Human Escape — auspicious formation. Nobles advance, marriages and wealth blessed.
丁加乙.cn: 贵人加官晋爵，婚姻财喜

丁加丙.name: 星随月转
丁加丙.meaning: Stars follow the Moon. Nobles leap ranks. Common people should be patient.
丁加丙.cn: 贵人越级高升，常人要忍

丁加丁.name: 星奇伏吟
丁加丁.meaning: Star Marvel stagnates but positively. Documents arrive, all wishes fulfilled.
丁加丁.cn: 文书证件即至，万事如意

丁加己.name: 火入勾陈
丁加己.meaning: Fire enters Hook Formation. Secret affairs, vendettas — problem caused by a woman.

丁加庚.name: 文书阻隔
丁加庚.meaning: Documents blocked. Traveler will return but communication is cut.

丁加辛.name: 朱雀入狱
丁加辛.meaning: Vermillion Bird imprisoned. Criminals released but officials lose position.

丁加壬.name: 五神互合
丁加壬.meaning: Five Spirits mutually combine (丁壬合). Noble's decree resolves lawsuits. But implies illicit relationships.
丁加壬.cn: 贵人恩诏讼狱平，淫荡合婚

丁加癸.name: 朱雀投江
丁加癸.meaning: Vermillion Bird drowns. Documents, verbal disputes, lawsuits — all unfavorable.
丁加癸.cn: 文书口舌是非，词讼不利

己加甲_己加戊.name: 犬遇青龙
己加甲_己加戊.meaning: Dog meets Green Dragon. Auspicious door = all goes well; inauspicious door = wasted effort.
己加甲_己加戊.cn: 门吉诸事遂，门凶枉费心机

己加乙.name: 墓神不明
己加乙.meaning: Tomb spirit unclear. Years wasted, everything murky and unclear.
己加乙.cn: 岁月蹉跎，凡事隐晦暗昧

己加丙.name: 火悖地户
己加丙.meaning: Fire rebels at Earth Gate. Men suffer injustice, women face scandal.

己加丁.name: 朱雀入墓
己加丁.meaning: Vermillion Bird enters tomb. Hidden luck within misfortune — turbulence first, then smooth.
己加丁.cn: 朱雀入墓凶中藏吉，先波折后顺利

己加己.name: 地户伏吟
己加己.meaning: Earth Gate stagnates. Worry, dissatisfaction, feeling powerless.
己加己.cn: 做事忧愁不满，力不从心

己加庚.name: 刑格反名
己加庚.meaning: Punishment reverses its name. Looks simple but is complicated. Awkward and uncomfortable.
己加庚.cn: 看似简单实驳杂，彆扭难受

己加辛.name: 游魂入墓
己加辛.meaning: Wandering soul enters tomb. Private desires cause mistakes, vulnerable to dark influences.
己加辛.cn: 因私欲造成错误，容易遭阴邪

己加壬.name: 地网高张
己加壬.meaning: Earth net spread wide. Surface calm hides disputes and conflict underneath.
己加壬.cn: 表面平和存在分争冲突

己加癸.name: 地刑玄武
己加癸.meaning: Earth punishes Black Tortoise. Vulnerable to petty people, false accusations.

geng_group.note: 庚 (Geng Metal) represents obstacles, enemies, the 七杀 (Seven Killings). ALL Geng combinations lean inauspicious.

庚加甲_庚加戊.name: 太乙伏宫
庚加甲_庚加戊.meaning: Great Unity hides in palace. Kindness repaid with betrayal, allies become enemies.
庚加甲_庚加戊.cn: 恩反成仇，众叛亲离官商不利

庚加乙.name: 太白逢星
庚加乙.meaning: Venus meets a star. Advance = danger, retreat = safety. Don't force plans.

庚加丙.name: 太白入荧
庚加丙.meaning: Venus enters Mars. Robbed, property lost. Host loses, guest gains.
庚加丙.cn: 被盗不羁，为主破财为客进利

庚加丁.name: 亭亭之格
庚加丁.meaning: Pavilion Formation. Private affairs lead to legal trouble. If stars align, lawsuit may not proceed.
庚加丁.cn: 因私情招官事，门星合吉官司不成

庚加己.name: 刑格
庚加己.cn: 官府刑格，有官非诉讼灾

庚加庚.name: 战格
庚加庚.meaning: Battle Formation. Official disasters, unexpected calamity. Brothers fight without hierarchy.
庚加庚.cn: 官灾横祸，兄弟雷攻不分大小

庚加辛.name: 白虎干格
庚加辛.meaning: White Tiger attacks. Long-distance travel extremely dangerous. Stay still.

庚加壬.name: 小格
庚加壬.meaning: Small Formation. Frequent forced transfers. Unfavorable for travel.
庚加壬.cn: 单位调动频仍，不利远行

庚加癸.name: 大格
庚加癸.meaning: Great Formation. Everything shifts unpredictably. Crisis lurks everywhere.
庚加癸.cn: 处处变化多端，危机四伏

辛加甲_辛加戊.name: 困龙被伤
辛加甲_辛加戊.meaning: Trapped Dragon wounded. Lawsuits fail. Keep your head down.

辛加乙.name: 白虎猖狂
辛加乙.meaning: White Tiger rampages. Family ruined, people perish. Travel brings many disasters.

辛加丙.name: 干合悖师
辛加丙.meaning: Stem combination rebels. Rain prediction works but not fair weather. Wealth leads to lawsuits.
辛加丙.cn: 占雨无占晴旱，因财致讼

辛加丁.name: 狱神得奇
辛加丁.meaning: Prison God gains Marvel. Business profits! Prisoners pardoned.

辛加己.name: 入狱自刑
辛加己.meaning: Enter prison, self-punishment. Servants betray master, lawsuits go nowhere.

辛加庚.name: 白虎出力
辛加庚.meaning: White Tiger exerts force. Two tigers fight — head-to-head conflict.

辛加辛.name: 伏吟天庭
辛加辛.meaning: Heavenly Court stagnates. Sacrifice public duty for private gain. Repeat mistakes.
辛加辛.cn: 公废私就，自己一错再错

辛加壬.name: 凶蛇入狱
辛加壬.meaning: Vicious Snake enters prison. Two men fight over a woman. Endless lawsuits.

辛加癸.name: 天牢华盖
辛加癸.meaning: Heaven's Prison under canopy. Sun and Moon lose light — trapped in the net.

壬加甲_壬加戊.name: 小蛇化龙
壬加甲_壬加戊.meaning: Small Snake becomes Dragon. Men succeed brilliantly. Pregnant women bear sons.

壬加乙.name: 小蛇得势
壬加乙.meaning: Small Snake gains power. Women become gentle, men prosper. Pregnancy = son.
壬加乙.cn: 女子柔顺男人发达，占孕生子

壬加丙.name: 水蛇入火
壬加丙.meaning: Water Snake enters fire. Official disasters and imprisonment, endlessly.

壬加丁.name: 干合蛇刑
壬加丁.meaning: Stem combines with Snake Punishment (丁壬合). Documents involve nobles. Good for men, bad for women.
壬加丁.cn: 文书牵连贵人现，男吉女凶

壬加己.name: 凶蛇入狱
壬加己.meaning: Vicious Snake imprisoned. Great disaster approaches. Husband-wife discord.

壬加庚.name: 太白擒蛇
壬加庚.meaning: Venus captures Snake. Justice prevails — lawsuits decided fairly.

壬加辛.name: 腾蛇相缠
壬加辛.meaning: Soaring Serpent entangles. Even with auspicious door, no peace. Being deceived.
壬加辛.cn: 纵得奇门也不安，被人欺瞒

壬加壬.name: 蛇入地罗
壬加壬.meaning: Snake enters Earth Net. External entanglements, internal difficulties. Auspicious door + star = escape.
壬加壬.cn: 外人缠绕内事索索，吉门吉星免

壬加癸.name: 幼女奸淫
壬加癸.meaning: Family scandals exposed. Even auspicious door + inauspicious star = hidden disaster.
壬加癸.cn: 家丑外扬，门吉星凶反祸

癸加甲_癸加戊.name: 天乙会合
癸加甲_癸加戊.meaning: Heavenly Unity gathers. Auspicious door = wealth and marriage joy. Pressed/inauspicious = lawsuits.

癸加乙.name: 华盖逢星
癸加乙.meaning: Canopy meets Star. Nobles gain fortune, common people stay average.

癸加丙.name: 华盖悖师
癸加丙.meaning: Canopy rebels against teacher. Neither noble nor common people benefit.

癸加丁.name: 螣蛇夭矫
癸加丁.meaning: Soaring Serpent writhes. Women face document-related lawsuits, financial loss.

癸加己.name: 华盖地户
癸加己.meaning: Canopy over Earth Gate. Wasted effort, but good for seeking fame or lawsuits.

癸加庚.name: 太白入网
癸加庚.meaning: Venus enters net. Violent disputes, lawsuits with equal force.

癸加辛.name: 网盖天牢
癸加辛.meaning: Net covers Heaven's Prison. Lose lawsuits, face death sentence.

癸加壬.name: 复见螣蛇
癸加壬.meaning: Soaring Serpent appears again. Remarriage, second wife bears no children.

癸加癸.name: 天网四张
癸加癸.meaning: Heaven's Net spread in all four directions. Travelers lose companions. Sick people and lawsuits — regret. Any rash action invites disaster.
癸加癸.cn: 行人失伴病讼悔，妄动招灾

section_2_use_case_differences.title: Different Chart Types & How Energy Reads Differently
section_2_use_case_differences.description: The SAME symbols mean different things depending on chart type. This is critical for the reading engine.

shi_pan_hourly.title: 时盘 (Hourly Chart) — Event Prediction
shi_pan_hourly.description: Most common chart type. Uses the current hour to answer a specific question.
shi_pan_hourly.method: Chart cast for the exact hour of the question (时家奇门). Four plates rotate based on the hour.
interpretation_focus: 日干 (Day Stem) = the querent (person asking)
时干 (Hour Stem) = the matter being asked about / the other party
用神 (Use God) = specific symbol for the topic (see use_gods section)
Relationship between 日干 palace and 用神 palace determines outcome
天盘干+地盘干 in relevant palace = 十干克应 reading
Door + Star + Deity in the palace = layered interpretation
shi_pan_hourly.key_principle: 时盘 reads like a snapshot — it captures the energy of THIS moment for THIS question.

ming_pan_destiny.title: 命盘 (Destiny Chart) — Life Reading
ming_pan_destiny.description: Cast using birth date/time. Reveals personality, life path, career, wealth potential.
ming_pan_destiny.method: Chart cast for the person's birth hour. The Day Stem palace becomes the 命宫 (Life Palace).
interpretation_differences: 日干落宫 = Life Palace (命宫) — person's core nature, health baseline
年干 = parents, elders, inherited traits
月干 = siblings, peers, social circle
时干 = children, subordinates, later life
Symbols describe PERSONALITY traits rather than events
天芮星 in Life Palace = chronic health issues, NOT acute illness
开门 in Life Palace = leadership nature, authority figure
生门 = wealth-accumulating nature, good at making money

major_periods_da_yun.description: 120-year life cycle mapped across 8 palaces, 15 years per palace
major_periods_da_yun.method: Start from birth year's Earthly Branch palace, move clockwise

within_each_palace.first_5_years: Read through the Nine Star in that palace
within_each_palace.middle_5_years: Read through the Eight Door in that palace
within_each_palace.last_5_years: Read through the 十干克应 (stem interaction) in that palace

annual_fortune_liu_nian.description: Each year maps to a Heavenly Stem + Earthly Branch
annual_fortune_liu_nian.method: Find the year's stem in the chart, analyze its palace relative to the Life Palace
annual_fortune_liu_nian.甲_years: Since 甲 is hidden, look at the stem it hides under (e.g., 甲申 year → look at 庚 + also check 申)
annual_fortune_liu_nian.key: Heavenly Stem = spatial energy, Earthly Branch = temporal energy. TIME is the biggest force in destiny charts.

nian_pan_annual.title: 年盘 (Annual Chart) — Year-Ahead Predictions
nian_pan_annual.description: Uses year-level QMDJ. All annual charts use 阴遁 (Yin Escape) only.
nian_pan_annual.method: 60-year cycle, one chart per year. Six Rites placed in reverse, Three Marvels placed forward.
interpretation_focus: Personal: overlay with destiny chart to see how the year's energy affects your life palace
Each palace represents a sector of life or geographic region

feng_shui_chart.title: 风水盘 (Feng Shui Chart) — Property Analysis
feng_shui_chart.description: Maps the QMDJ nine-palace grid onto a physical space.
method_steps: Step 1: 值符 (Value Symbol) = macro environment quality. If thriving + good formation → good neighborhood.
Step 2: 值使门 (Duty Door) = main entrance of the residence. Its palace determines door energy.
Step 3: Querent's 年命 (year stem) palace = their bedroom's energy.
Step 4: 壬 palace = water/kitchen (water governs wealth). 丙 palace = people/family growth.
Step 5: Each palace direction maps to the corresponding area of the house.
Step 6: 时干生日干 = house supports person (吉). 时干克日干 = house harms person (凶).

symbol_meanings_feng_shui.天芮星: Sick energy in that area — avoid placing bedroom there

section_3_eight_doors.title: 八门 (Eight Doors) Interpretation
section_3_eight_doors.description: The Eight Doors represent the HUMAN layer — actions, relationships, social dynamics. They are the most intuitive layer for reading.

开门.core_meaning: Opening, beginning, authority, leadership, formal institutions
开门.career: Government offices, courts, banks, large corporations. Official career, promotions, starting businesses.
开门.wealth: Favorable for large-scale business, formal commerce, investments through proper channels.
开门.health: Hospitals (Western medicine), surgery. As use god for workplace = the company itself.
开门.relationships: Formal relationships, marriage. Open and public connections.
开门.objects: Official documents, contracts, seals, keys, gates
开门.actions: Opening business, signing contracts, starting campaigns, military expeditions, traveling far

休门.core_meaning: Rest, leisure, ease, government connections, blessings
休门.career: Government service, civil service, public sector. Smooth career without much struggle.
休门.wealth: Wealth from prestigious sources, inherited wealth, noble people's money.
休门.health: Recovery, rest, recuperation. Good for healing.
休门.relationships: Harmonious family, meeting influential people. Good for seeking favors.
休门.objects: Rest areas, beds, vacation spots, government buildings
休门.people: Government officials, nobles, family members, the resting/retired
休门.actions: Meeting nobles/leaders, seeking appointments, marriage, relocation, business

生门.core_meaning: Growth, vitality, profit, real estate, new beginnings
生门.career: Entrepreneurship, real estate, agriculture, finance. Creating something from nothing.
生门.wealth: STRONGEST wealth indicator. Profits, salary, investments, property income. Land wealth.
生门.health: Vitality, life force. Recovery from illness. Pregnancy.
生门.relationships: Growth in relationships, new connections, fruitful unions.
生门.objects: Real estate, farmland, livestock, profits, wages, money
生门.people: Entrepreneurs, farmers, real estate agents, bankers
生门.actions: Seeking wealth, trading, real estate deals, marriage, childbirth, planting, raising livestock

伤门.career: Competitive environments, fighting industries. Law enforcement, debt collection.
伤门.wealth: Gambling gains, aggressive collection. Unfavorable for normal business.
伤门.health: Physical injuries, accidents, surgery complications, limb injuries.
伤门.relationships: Arguments, domestic violence, separation. Breaking relationships.
伤门.objects: Vehicles, weapons, sports equipment, mechanical tools
伤门.people: Criminal police, debt collectors, hunters, athletes, aggressors
伤门.actions: Debt collection, hunting, catching thieves, competitive sports, demolition

杜门.career: Military, police, security, intelligence, covert operations.
杜门.wealth: Blocked wealth flow. Hidden income sources. Underground economy.
杜门.health: Chronic conditions that are hidden. Mental health issues, depression.
杜门.relationships: Secret relationships, hidden affairs. Communication blocks.
杜门.objects: Locks, walls, barriers, security systems, military installations
杜门.people: Military personnel, police, security guards, spies, hermits
杜门.body: Bile ducts, intestinal blockages, immune system
杜门.actions: Hiding, fleeing, covert operations, flood prevention, secret imprisonment

景门.core_meaning: Visibility, beauty, documents, culture, light, appearance
景门.career: Arts, culture, education, media, entertainment, strategy, consulting.
景门.wealth: Wealth from knowledge, consulting, arts. Appearance-based income.
景门.health: Eye problems, heart issues, blood pressure. Skin/beauty.
景门.relationships: Passionate but potentially superficial. Good appearance but may lack substance.
景门.objects: Documents, books, paintings, screens, lights, awards
景门.people: Artists, writers, consultants, strategists, scholars, celebrities
景门.actions: Strategic planning, talent selection, games, drinking gatherings, performing

死门.core_meaning: Death, endings, stillness, land, graves, finality
死门.career: Funeral industry, cemetery work, real estate (land), mining.
死门.wealth: Dead money — investments that cannot be recovered. Land/property that sits unused.
死门.health: Serious illness, terminal conditions, death-related issues.
死门.objects: Graves, coffins, unused land, dead stock inventory
死门.people: The deceased, funeral directors, gravediggers, the elderly/sick
死门.body: Abdomen, digestive system shutdown, reproductive issues
死门.actions: Funerals, mourning, warfare, hunting, execution, demolition of old structures

惊门.core_meaning: Shock, alarm, verbal conflict, lawsuits, performance, eloquence
惊门.career: Law, performance arts, speaking, debate, comedy, sales. Anything using the mouth.
惊门.wealth: Wealth through lawsuits, verbal deals, negotiation. Unstable.
惊门.health: Anxiety, panic attacks, throat/mouth problems, dental issues.
惊门.relationships: Frightening arguments, legal disputes between partners, shocking revelations.
惊门.objects: Legal documents, microphones, stages, bells, alarms
惊门.people: Lawyers, performers, comedians, debaters, singers, salespeople
惊门.actions: Lawsuits, arrests, setting traps/ambushes, gambling, creating chaos

section_4_nine_stars.title: 九星 (Nine Stars) Interpretation
section_4_nine_stars.description: The Nine Stars represent the HEAVEN layer — timing, environmental factors, the 'weather' of a situation. They indicate the quality of timing and cosmic support.

天蓬星.personality: Bold, reckless, loves darkness and secrecy. Risk-taker.
天蓬星.career: Military border defense, risk ventures, speculation, smuggling, gambling.
天蓬星.wealth: Wealth through risky/unconventional means. High risk, high reward.
天蓬星.health: Kidney problems, sexual diseases, reproductive issues, alcoholism.
天蓬星.relationships: Secretive affairs, unstable relationships, attraction to danger.
天蓬星.people: Criminals, generals, gamblers, risk-takers, those who work in darkness
天蓬星.feng_shui: Near water features, dark areas, basement energy
天蓬星.suitable_actions: Border defense, city fortification, flood control

天芮星.personality: Patient, enduring, but associated with illness and drain.
天芮星.career: Agriculture, apprenticeship, women's work, nursing, elderly care.
天芮星.wealth: Wealth drains, medical expenses, financial illness.
天芮星.health: THE primary disease indicator. Where 天芮 falls = location of disease. Use god for all health readings.
天芮星.people: Patients, farmers, apprentices, women, the frail
天芮星.feng_shui: Sick energy zone — NEVER place bedroom where 天芮 falls

天冲星.personality: Decisive, aggressive, swift action. Lightning-fast execution.
天冲星.career: Market pioneering, sports, military, startups, sales.
天冲星.wealth: Wealth through bold action, first-mover advantage.
天冲星.health: Liver energy, anger management, high blood pressure from stress.
天冲星.relationships: Passionate but impatient. Quick to start, quick to end.
天冲星.people: Warriors, athletes, pioneers, sales champions, startup founders
天冲星.suitable_actions: Military campaigns, revenge missions, spring/summer battles

天辅星.personality: Elegant, literary, cultured, loves reading and learning.
天辅星.career: Education, culture, arts, advisory, mentoring, consulting.
天辅星.wealth: Wealth through knowledge, teaching, intellectual property.
天辅星.health: Good mental health, but may neglect physical body.
天辅星.relationships: Cultured, refined partnerships. Values intellectual connection.
天辅星.suitable_actions: Exams, education development, ALL things — universally auspicious

天禽星.palace: 中五宫 (Center, lodges in 坤二宫)
天禽星.personality: Loyal, honest, reliable. Earth center energy — supports everything.
天禽星.career: Government service, central administration, land management, mining.
天禽星.wealth: Stable, reliable wealth accumulation. Real estate, agriculture.
天禽星.health: Spleen/stomach issues, but generally protective energy.
天禽星.relationships: Loyal, dependable. The most trustworthy partner.
天禽星.suitable_actions: Prayers, military, ALL things — four seasons auspicious

天心星.personality: Strategic, intelligent, good at managing, healing ability.
天心星.wealth: Wealth through strategy, medicine, management positions.
天心星.health: THE healing star. Best indicator for medical treatment success. Good doctors.
天心星.relationships: Wise counsel in relationships. Strategic partnerships.
天心星.suitable_actions: Medical diagnosis, finding prescriptions, autumn/winter battles

天柱星.personality: Eloquent, sharp-tongued, destructive, but can be stabilizing force.
天柱星.career: Military, police, law, teaching, acting, diplomacy, eloquence-based work.
天柱星.wealth: Destructive to wealth. Breaking apart existing structures.
天柱星.health: Respiratory issues, oral/dental problems, injury from metal.
天柱星.relationships: Sharp-tongued arguments, verbal abuse, relationship destruction.
天柱星.people: Military police, teachers, lawyers, actors, diplomats

天任星.personality: Hardworking, patient, benevolent, nurturing. Bears responsibility willingly.
天任星.career: Mining, agriculture, land management, civil service, education.
天任星.wealth: Steady wealth from hard work, land, minerals. Not flashy but reliable.
天任星.health: Stomach/spleen related, but generally protective energy.
天任星.people: Farmers, miners, civil servants, educators, nurturers
天任星.suitable_actions: Business, meeting officials, military, marriage — universally good

天英星.career: Fire-related, media, internet, entertainment, film, electricity.
天英星.wealth: Volatile wealth — easy come, easy go. Blood-money.
天英星.health: Heart problems, blood disorders, eye issues, burns.
天英星.relationships: Passionate but unstable. Dramatic, possibly violent.
天英星.people: Media personalities, entertainers, firefighters, IT workers

section_5_eight_deities.title: 八神 (Eight Deities) Interpretation
section_5_eight_deities.description: The Eight Deities represent the SPIRIT layer — unseen forces, luck, karmic influence, the 'invisible hand' affecting outcomes.

hidden_deities.勾陈: Hidden under 白虎, Earth element, 凶 — entanglement/delays
hidden_deities.朱雀: Hidden under 玄武, Fire element, 凶 — verbal disputes/gossip

值符.nature: 吉 Auspicious — MOST auspicious of all deities
值符.core_meaning: Supreme authority, divine protection, justice, leadership
值符.description: The chief of all eight deities. Wherever 值符 goes, all evil disperses. Even the fierce 庚 metal is neutralized.
值符.reading_meaning: Smooth progress, divine protection, authority backing you
值符.feng_shui: Overall macro environment of the property
值符.career: Boss, top leader, the ultimate authority figure

腾蛇.description: The deity of falsehood and illusion. Nothing is what it seems. Causes confusion, fear, and deception.
腾蛇.reading_meaning: Hidden crisis, deception, things are not what they appear
腾蛇.relationships: Deceptive partner, false appearances, illusions about love

太阴.core_meaning: Secrecy, strategy, feminine wisdom, hidden protection, covert aid
太阴.description: The protector in shadows. Best for hiding soldiers and avoiding disaster. Represents feminine, yin-type assistance.
太阴.reading_meaning: Strategic approach needed, help comes from behind the scenes, women help you
太阴.career: Covert operations, strategic planning, behind-the-scenes power
太阴.relationships: Help from women, secretive but genuine support

六合.description: The deity of coming together. Represents all forms of union — marriage, business partnerships, alliances.
六合.reading_meaning: Cooperation succeeds, partnerships form, harmony in relationships
六合.career: Joint ventures, partnerships, M&A, collaborative projects
六合.relationships: THE marriage/matchmaking deity. When 六合 appears, union is favored

白虎.core_meaning: Violence, conflict, blood, warfare, legal force
白虎.description: The fierce warrior deity. Brings fighting, disease, blood, and death. Associated with military and law enforcement.
白虎.reading_meaning: Danger of violence, accident, surgery, forced legal action
白虎.health: Surgery, blood loss, physical injuries, violent illness
白虎.career: Military/police matters, forced separations, hostile takeovers
白虎.hidden_deity: 勾陈 (Hook Formation) hides beneath — represents delays, entanglement, bureaucratic stalling

玄武.core_meaning: Theft, betrayal, deception, hiding, escape, running away
玄武.description: The deity of concealment and theft. Represents those who steal, betray, run away, and hide.
玄武.reading_meaning: Beware of theft, betrayal, hidden enemies, people running from responsibility
玄武.relationships: Cheating partner, secret betrayal, hidden affairs
玄武.hidden_deity: 朱雀 (Vermillion Bird) hides beneath — represents verbal attacks, gossip, slander, document disputes

九地.nature: Traditionally 凶 but practically 吉 for defense
九地.description: The solid ground deity. Best for defensive positioning, holding territory, and long-term stability.
九地.reading_meaning: Hold your ground, be patient, defensive strategy wins, stability
九地.career: Consolidation, defense of position, long-term holding
九地.feng_shui: Excellent for property stability, grounding energy

九天.core_meaning: Expansion, elevation, ambition, long-distance, heavenly power
九天.description: The deity of upward movement and expansion. Suited for grand ambitions, travel, and military deployment.
九天.reading_meaning: Aim high, expand, travel far, major advancement possible
九天.career: International expansion, ambitious projects, going public, big moves
九天.relationships: Long-distance relationships, grand gestures, elevated partnerships

section_6_formations.title: 格局 (Formations/Patterns)
section_6_formations.description: Standard QMDJ formation patterns that have specific interpretive meanings beyond individual symbol readings.

九遁_nine_escapes.description: Nine special auspicious formations where energy 'hides' in favorable configurations. These are the highest-level auspicious patterns.

天遁_heavenly_escape.condition: 天盘丙奇 + 地盘丁奇 + 人盘生门 in 坎一宫
天遁_heavenly_escape.meaning: Celestial transformation. Tangible obstacles dissolve into nothing.
天遁_heavenly_escape.application: Lost things recovered, ventures gain momentum without resistance.
天遁_heavenly_escape.timing: Occurs seasonally at solstices and equinoxes

地遁_earthly_escape.condition: 开门 + 乙奇 + 地盘六己
地遁_earthly_escape.meaning: Earth's concealment — dormant forces activate for regeneration.
地遁_earthly_escape.application: Commerce flourishes, products gain supernatural appeal. Favorable for site selection.

人遁_human_escape.condition: 天盘丁奇 + 人盘休门 + 神盘太阴
人遁_human_escape.meaning: Human potential elevates from mundane to divine capability.
人遁_human_escape.application: Career advancement, scholarly success, wealth generation. Personal talent shines.

风遁_wind_escape.meaning: Wind energy — proactive initiative overcomes obstacles.
风遁_wind_escape.application: Contract modifications favorable, personnel changes resolve stagnation.

云遁_cloud_escape.condition: 天盘乙奇 + 开/休/生三吉门 + 地盘六辛
云遁_cloud_escape.meaning: Dark clouds dissipate — adverse conditions fade but instability remains.
云遁_cloud_escape.application: Stabilize positions, maintain existing gains, avoid hasty decisions.

龙遁_dragon_escape.condition: 天盘乙奇 + 开/休/生三吉门之一 + 坎一宫 or 地盘六癸
龙遁_dragon_escape.meaning: Dormant dragon rises — sleeping potential awakens for greatness.
龙遁_dragon_escape.application: Foundation-setting for major success. Career advancement, migration.

虎遁_tiger_escape.condition: 乙奇 + 休门(或生门) + 地盘六辛 + 艮宫
虎遁_tiger_escape.meaning: Hidden threats intensify — danger shifts from obvious to concealed.
虎遁_tiger_escape.application: Requires vigilance, protect reputation, avoid financial risks.

神遁_divine_escape.condition: 天盘六丙 + 九天 + 丙合生门
神遁_divine_escape.meaning: Divine power appears ordinary — reality obscured by illusion.
神遁_divine_escape.application: Avoid major moves. Focus on negotiation and learning.

鬼遁_ghost_escape.condition: 杜门 + 六乙 + 九地
鬼遁_ghost_escape.meaning: Ghost concealment — deception paired with lethal intent.
鬼遁_ghost_escape.application: Direct methods fail. Success through cunning and decisiveness only.

三诈_three_deceptions.description: Three strategic formations using deception for advantage. Requires: 三奇 (乙丙丁) + 三吉门 (开休生) + specific deity.

真诈_true_deception.condition: 乙/丙/丁三奇 + 开/休/生三吉门 + 太阴
真诈_true_deception.meaning: True deception — favorable for secret praise, blessings, prayer, spiritual practices, and hiding.
真诈_true_deception.application: 利于表彰、招福、求仙、祈祷、隐遁

重诈_heavy_deception.condition: 乙/丙/丁三奇 + 开/休/生三吉门 + 九地
重诈_heavy_deception.meaning: Heavy deception — favorable for seeking wealth, promotion, gaining people, expeditions, conferring titles.
重诈_heavy_deception.application: 适合求财、升迁、进人口、出征、授爵授衔

休诈_rest_deception.condition: 乙/丙/丁三奇 + 开/休/生三吉门 + 六合
休诈_rest_deception.meaning: Rest deception — favorable for prayer, healing illness, and ritualistic ceremonies.

三诈_three_deceptions.marriage_warning: 三诈五假填房客 — In marriage readings, 三诈 indicates second marriage / remarriage.

五假_five_feints.description: Five formations for 'borrowing' energy — hiding true intentions to achieve goals through false appearances.
五假_five_feints.warning: If door is tomb-pressed (门迫) or stems enter tomb (奇仪入墓), feint turns inauspicious.

天假_heaven_feint.condition: 景门 + 乙/丙/丁三奇之一 + 九天
天假_heaven_feint.meaning: Borrow heavenly timing. Fire + light + upward expansion.
天假_heaven_feint.application: Favorable for advancing, petitioning, presenting your case.

地假_earth_feint.condition: 杜门 + 丁/己/癸 + 九地
地假_earth_feint.meaning: Borrow earthly advantage. Concealment + earth + grounding.
地假_earth_feint.application: Favorable for hiding, ambush. With 太阴: send spies. With 六合: retreat/escape.

人假_human_feint.condition: 惊门 + 六壬 + 九天
人假_human_feint.meaning: Borrow human force. Shock + water + expansion.
人假_human_feint.application: Favorable for pursuing fugitives and capturing escapees.

神假_divine_feint.condition: 伤门 + 丁/己/癸 + 九地
神假_divine_feint.application: Favorable for burial and memorial services.

鬼假_ghost_feint.condition: 死门 + 丁/己/癸 + 九地
鬼假_ghost_feint.application: Favorable for funeral rites, exorcism, tomb repair, appeasing spirits, hunting.

三奇升殿.condition: 乙 in 震宫 (临官), 丙 in 离宫 (帝旺), 丁 in 兑宫 (长生)
三奇升殿.meaning: Three Marvels ascend to their throne — each Marvel in its most powerful palace. Peak authority.

三奇得使.condition: 三奇 + 值使门 in same palace
三奇得使.meaning: Three Marvels gain a messenger — inauspicious turns to minor auspicious. Danger becomes opportunity.

玉女守门.condition: 地盘丁奇 + 值使门 in same palace
玉女守门.meaning: Jade Maiden guards the gate — protective and auspicious.

青龙返首.meaning: Green Dragon turns back — great fortune in all endeavors.

飞鸟跌穴.meaning: Bird falls into perfect nest — everything lands perfectly.

小蛇化龙.meaning: Small snake transforms into dragon — dramatic positive transformation.

伏吟.condition: Stars/doors/stems return to their original palace
伏吟.meaning: Stagnation — things are stuck, cannot move, tangled. WAIT.

反吟.condition: Stars/doors/stems move to their opposite palace
反吟.meaning: Rapid reversal — everything changes quickly, multiple flip-flops.

六仪击刑.meaning: Especially dangerous — severe conflicts, punishments, legal disasters.

五不遇时.meaning: Critical decisions MUST NOT be made during these times.

荧入太白.meaning: Mars enters Venus — property destroyed, thieves steal.

太白入荧.meaning: Venus enters Mars — guard against thieves and raiders.

白虎猖狂.meaning: White Tiger rampages — family destruction, travel disasters.

青龙逃走.meaning: Green Dragon flees — people die, wealth scatters, betrayal.

朱雀投江.meaning: Vermillion Bird drowns — document disputes, lawsuits, verbal attacks.

天网四张.meaning: Heaven's Net spread everywhere — trapped with no escape.

section_7_yin_plate_specifics.title: 阴盘 (Yin Plate) vs 阳盘 (Yang Plate) Differences & Chang Qing School
section_7_yin_plate_specifics.description: Critical distinctions that affect how The Jade Oracle should interpret charts.

yang_plate.basis: Solar calendar (太阳历). Uses 24 solar terms + 60 甲子.
yang_plate.局数_method: Divide each solar term's 15 days into upper/middle/lower 元 (5 days each), each mapped to a specific 局 number.
yang_plate.stem_placement: Standard forward/reverse placement based on Yin/Yang Escape.

yin_plate.basis: Lunar calendar (太阴历). Uses moon phase cycles.
yin_plate.局数_method: Add year/month/day/hour 太阴数, divide by 9, remainder = 局 number.
yin_plate.note: The Jade Oracle engine uses 阴盘 method as per 长卿 lineage.

yang_plate_approach.focus: 格局 (Formations) — must memorize all 81 stem combinations and their fixed meanings
yang_plate_approach.philosophy: 论吉凶 — symbols are inherently auspicious or inauspicious

yin_plate_approach.focus: 取象 (Image-taking) — understand each symbol's ENERGY, then read combinations intuitively
yin_plate_approach.philosophy: 无吉凶 — symbols have no inherent good/bad, they describe ENERGY STATES
yin_plate_approach.key_principle: 临事而审情 — examine the situation at hand, then deeply analyze around the 用神 (use god)

调理手段_remediation.description: 阴盘 has built-in remediation methods that 阳盘 lacks
methods: 拆补移 — Dismantle, supplement, and move energy
移星换斗 — Shift stars, swap constellations (repositioning energy)
山向奇门 — Mountain direction QMDJ (geographic orientation remediation)
调理手段_remediation.purpose: After identifying problems in a chart, use these methods to CHANGE the outcome rather than merely predicting it

symbol_reading.description: In 阴盘, you only need to know each symbol's meaning, then combine them based on the specific context and person
symbol_reading.no_memorization: Unlike 阳盘, you do NOT need to memorize all 81 formation names — understand the energy dynamics instead
symbol_reading.context_dependent: The same symbol combination means different things based on: (1) what you're asking, (2) who you're asking about, (3) the surrounding palace context

chang_qing_school.note_on_naming: User studies under 长卿, NOT 翁向宏. These are different teachers in the 阴盘 tradition.
chang_qing_school.lineage: 道家阴盘奇门 (Daoist Yin Plate QMDJ)
chang_qing_school.search_results: Limited specific online content about 长卿's unique methods — most 阴盘 content is general. The school's specific techniques are likely transmitted privately through course materials (风生水起, 富贵花开, 易商智慧 series).
known_characteristics: Emphasizes 取象 over 格局
Energy-state reading rather than fixed fortune/misfortune labels
Practical business and wealth application (易商智慧 = Business Wisdom)
Feng shui applications (风生水起 = Wind and Water Rising)

section_8_use_gods_by_topic.title: 用神 (Use Gods) — Focus Symbols by Reading Topic
section_8_use_gods_by_topic.description: When reading for different life areas, different symbols serve as the PRIMARY focus. This is essential for the reading engine to know WHAT to look at.

identity.日干_day_stem: The querent (person asking). PRIMARY identity marker.
identity.时干_hour_stem: Children, subordinates, later life, the other party in a question.

wealth_and_career.戊: Capital, investments, main wealth indicator. 戊's palace strength = financial strength.
wealth_and_career.生门: Profits, salary, income flow. THE wealth door.
wealth_and_career.值符: Top boss, CEO, ultimate authority. Also overall direction.
wealth_and_career.天蓬星: Financial star (坎水 = flowing money). Direction to seek money.

relationships_and_marriage.六合: Relationship harmony indicator. Marriage matchmaking deity.
relationships_and_marriage.日干_vs_乙_or_庚: Compare querent's palace with partner symbol's palace for compatibility.

health_and_illness.天芮星: THE disease indicator. Where it falls = disease location/nature.
health_and_illness.天心星: THE healing indicator. Doctor quality, treatment success.
health_and_illness.值符: Disease cause, origin, direction of illness.

legal_and_conflict.庚: Opponent, enemy, obstacle, the thing blocking you.

feng_shui.年命落宫: Bedroom quality for the specific person.
feng_shui.壬: Water features, kitchen water, plumbing (governs wealth).
feng_shui.时干_vs_日干: 时干生日干 = house supports person. 时干克日干 = house harms person.

implementation_notes.title: Notes for Reading Engine Implementation
items: CRITICAL: The same symbols mean different things per chart type. The engine MUST branch on chart_type (时盘/命盘/年盘/风水) before interpreting.
For 阴盘 approach: present interpretations as ENERGY DESCRIPTIONS, not fixed fortunes. Say 'the energy suggests...' not 'you will...'
十干克应 is the foundation — every palace reading should start with the stem interaction name and meaning.
Layer the reading: Stem interaction → Door meaning → Star meaning → Deity meaning → Palace element interaction.
For wealth readings: always check 戊 palace AND 生门 palace. Cross-reference with 日干 palace.
For health: 天芮 location = disease site, 天心 location = treatment quality, body part = from nine palace mapping.
门迫 (door pressed) = when door's element is overcome by palace's element. This weakens the door's meaning significantly.
入墓 (entering tomb) = when a stem enters its tomb palace. This 'buries' the stem's energy — very negative.
旺衰 (thriving/declining) = check if symbols are in their season. Spring = Wood thrives, Metal declines, etc.
The 81 formation names are useful as LABELS for the AI reading, but the actual interpretation should follow 阴盘 取象 method — contextual, not rigid.
